title: The Fed - Transcripts and other historical materials
summary: This is a Federal Reserve website navigation/index page that provides access to FOMC historical materials through search and year-based browsing. The page itself contains no specific FOMC transcripts, meeting minutes, rate decisions, or substantive policy content. It merely serves as a portal linking to various Federal Reserve sections including monetary policy, supervision, financial stability, payment systems, and economic research.
key_points: Page is a navigation/index portal, not an archiveable source of FOMC content
Contains links to FOMC search tools and 'View transcripts and historical materials by year' functionality
Describes a document filter for advanced searching of FOMC materials
The page references but does not contain actual FOMC transcripts or historical documents
No publication date or specific meeting dates are provided on this page
why_it_matters: This source cannot serve as an archiveable record for market structure or macro catalysts research. It is a web navigation interface that merely provides access pathways to historical FOMC documents. Researchers seeking FOMC transcripts, statements, or minutes must use the linked search tools and select specific years/meetings to retrieve actual content.

issues_found: Page type is navigation_page — violates rule 5 (reject for homepage, navigation_page, listing_page, search_page)
Source contains no substantive FOMC content — only navigation links and search interface
No publication date provided on the page
Cannot verify relevance to market structure or macro catalysts without actual FOMC content
event_type correctly set to 'unknown' but source provides no specific event to classify
Insufficient for meaningful research archive entry — no transcripts, statements, minutes, or policy content present

notes: Non-archiveable navigation page. The page contains no FOMC transcripts, meeting statements, minutes, speeches, or any macro-relevant content. It is an index portal providing access pathways. The URL points to the index rather than a specific historical document. For archive purposes, this record should be discarded and replaced with actual FOMC documents accessed via the search functionality. SOURCE METADATA TOPIC field lists 'macro catalysts' but the page does not contain any such content.
